top_signals.title: Defense spending, China in Asia and lessons from Ukraine: Takeways from the 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue
top_signals.summary: The summit sees top world leaders, defence officials and key executives gathering in Singapore from May 29 to 31
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Turkey Is in Talks With Russia on Gas Supplies Beyond 2026
top_signals.summary: Turkey and Russia are discussing an extension of natural gas supply agreements beyond 2026 as current deals expire at the end of the year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Military Metals sinks on revoked Slovak antimony project licence
top_signals.summary: Trojarova, located near the capital city Bratislava, represents an advanced exploration stage project with considerable mining history.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pan American approves $146M Timmins expansion
top_signals.summary: Investment in Ontario targets deeper mining, new deposits and future production growth across the Timmins camp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Pulsar Helium acquires 1,360 acres for $2.4M at Topaz project in Minnesota
top_signals.summary: Topaz is one of the leading primary helium discoveries in the US, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ABF Seizes Cocaine Concealed in RoRo Cargo
top_signals.summary: The Australian Border Force has seized 34kg cocaine concealed within a luxury bus in Fremantle, Western Australia.ABF officers examined a roll-on/roll-off vessel on May 6, using a combination of targeted intelligence, physical search, detector dogs and advanced technology.During the inspection…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes outage affecting MFA setup, MySignIn service
top_signals.summary: Microsoft is working to address an ongoing incident preventing customers from setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA) or accessing the My Sign-Ins platform. [...]
